task_md:
# Task 1: Equipment Catalog Service

Build a Rust/Axum API serving 533+ products.
decisions_md:
## Decisions

- Use PostgreSQL for product storage
- CDN via R2 for images
acceptance_md:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] GET /api/v1/catalog/products returns paginated list
- [ ] Availability check responds < 500ms

task_md:
# Task 2: Rental Management System

Go/gRPC service replacing Current RMS.
decisions_md:
## Decisions

- gRPC with grpc-gateway for REST compatibility
acceptance_md:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Opportunity lifecycle works end-to-end
- [ ] Barcode scanning triggers correct inventory transactions

task_md:
# Task 3: Finance Service

Rust/Axum invoicing and payments.
decisions_md:
## Decisions

- Stripe for payment processing
- Multi-currency with daily rate sync
acceptance_md:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Invoice generation from project completes < 5s
- [ ] Stripe webhook handles payment confirmation
